beats.text: Fewer dead ends. More real shots.

soraPrompts.prompt: Vertical 9:16, bright modern office daylight, close shot of hands scrolling a laptop with many browser tabs open, fast scrolling, subtle frustration, clean minimal desk, premium commercial cinematography, shallow depth of field, natural skin tones, no readable real website text, no logos.

Vertical 9:16, bright clean motion-graphics UI: generic opportunity match cards smoothly appearing with subtle checkmarks, white/gray dashboard aesthetic, orange accent, minimal premium SaaS style, crisp typography, no brand names, no claims, no real-world site text.
Vertical 9:16, bright desk scene, phone close-up receiving a generic notification reading 'New Match Alert' (no logos), tasteful modern UI, shallow depth of field, premium product ad look.

Vertical 9:16, bright office, confident business owner reviewing a document then a clean professional handshake, premium corporate commercial style, natural skin tones, no cheesy stock vibe, shallow depth of field.
